response.step_by_step_log: Used OCR to identify song titles 'Fire Dance' and 'Bunny Girl - heiakim Remix'. Identified performers as Hololive talents based on the #ReineMEPtember2025 hashtag. Searched for '[Song Title] [Original Artist] [Original Language] and English lyrics' for each. Found lyrics for both. Note: The song 'Fire Dance' is by Vivid BAD SQUAD (original) and 'Bunny Girl - heiakim Remix' is by AKASAKI (original). Simplified search terms to "[Song Title] [Original Artist] Japanese and English lyrics".
response.global_summary: A two-song performance video featuring Hololive talents Pavolia Reine, Takanashi Kiara, Momosuzu Nene, and Anya Melfissa. The first song is 'Fire Dance' (by Vivid BAD SQUAD, covered by the Hololive group) and the second is 'Bunny Girl - heiakim Remix' (by AKASAKI, covered by Pavolia Reine and Anya Melfissa).

scenes.description: Group performance of 'Fire Dance'. Text in top-left indicates song title.
scenes.performer_in_video: Pavolia Reine, Takanashi Kiara, Momosuzu Nene, Anya Melfissa, original artist: Vivid BAD SQUAD
